title: stenanthemum leucophractum
intro: Stenanthemum leucophractum, also known as white-fruited button bush, is a shrub-like plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Rhamnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stenanthemum leucophractum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a popular remedy in traditional Australian medicine.
